localEndpoints.name: CaseRoom local QVAC bridge
localEndpoints.purpose: Local model orchestration for patient completion, ASR, TTS, and RAG
localEndpoints.dataSent: Synthetic case session state, clinician prompts, local microphone audio chunks, debrief retrieval queries

modelArtifactDownloads.purpose: First-run download/cache of selected QVAC model artifacts
modelArtifactDownloads.dataSent: Model artifact requests only; no patient or encounter transcript data is sent by CaseRoom
modelArtifactDownloads.when: Only when required model artifacts are not already present in the local QVAC cache

modelArtifactDownloads.purpose: Manual MedPsy model reference/download if QVAC SDK exposes or supports that model path in the active environment
modelArtifactDownloads.dataSent: Model artifact requests only; no CaseRoom runtime data
modelArtifactDownloads.when: Manual setup only; not used by the current default runtime path

notes: The application runtime does not call cloud LLM APIs.
All clinical simulation data stays on the local device unless the operator manually shares exported artifacts.
